A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- DEFENDANT DOW CHEMICAL COMPANY'S Motion To Strike Certain Allegations In The First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice When Ruling On The Motion To Strike -- Granted without leave to amend as to 5th c/a (Strict Liability/Defective Product); Granted with leave to amend as to 7th paragraph (Market Share Doctrine); and granted with leave as to 3rd c/a (Negligence-Failure to Warn).
